title: × coeloglossgymnadenia jacksonii
intro: × Coeloglossum × Gymnadenia jacksonii, also known as Jackson's coeloglossum, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Jackson's coeloglossum may include reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system response. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures.
